title: Caddy Sites Configuration Schema
description: Schema for validating the JSON configuration file parsed by create_sites.sh to generate Caddy site configurations.

domains.description: An array of apex domains governed by this configuration block (e.g., mydomain.com).

redirect_to.description: If specified, all domains in the array will generate wildcard redirects forwarding to this destination.

log.description: Specifies whether to inject the default apex domain logging snippet. Defaults to true.

import.description: An array of root-level Caddy snippets to import into the site block (positioned right before the fallback handler).

fallback_handler.description: An array of raw Caddyfile directives representing the default fallback catch-all block.

services.description: A map of subdomain service definitions belonging to these domains.

enabled.description: Determines whether this service block is generated. Defaults to true.

log.description: Specifies whether to inject service-level log snippets. Defaults to true.

hostnames.description: An array of subdomains (prefixes only, e.g., 'home', 'dashboard') mapped to this service.

import.description: An array of service-level Caddy snippets to import.

handler.description: An array of raw Caddyfile directives representing a custom handler block.

proxy_target.description: Reverse proxy parameters. Do not define if using a custom 'handler'.

protocol.description: The protocol schema used to connect upstream.

host_address.description: The upstream hostname or IP address.
